name: Entity-type value->table suite (2026-06-05)
description: Entity-subtype values named as the entity noun (transformer/generator/substation = Assets.AssetType) must count Assets, not the nearest name-matched table. Trap cases: attribute values (resolved/active/high) must not be indexed or pull a wrong table.

Scenarios.Question: how many transformers do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Assets WHERE AssetType='Transformer'
Scenarios.GoldSource: entity-type value->table index suite, executed gold 2026-06-05

Scenarios.Question: how many generators are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Assets WHERE AssetType='Generator'
Scenarios.GoldSource: entity-type value->table index suite, executed gold 2026-06-05

Scenarios.Question: how many substations do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Assets WHERE AssetType='Substation'
Scenarios.GoldSource: entity-type value->table index suite, executed gold 2026-06-05

Scenarios.Question: how many transformer assets are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Assets WHERE AssetType='Transformer'
Scenarios.GoldSource: entity-type value->table index suite, executed gold 2026-06-05

Scenarios.Question: how many resolved tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON t.StatusId=s.Id WHERE s.Name='Resolved' AND t.IsDeleted=0
Scenarios.GoldSource: entity-type value->table index suite, executed gold 2026-06-05

Scenarios.Question: how many active customers
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers WHERE Status='Active'
Scenarios.GoldSource: entity-type value->table index suite, executed gold 2026-06-05

Scenarios.Question: how many high priority work orders
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WorkOrders WHERE Priority='High'
Scenarios.GoldSource: entity-type value->table index suite, executed gold 2026-06-05
